songs.title: What's My Age Again?
feed: “What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 21 spots to #1.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 21 spots to #1.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 88% to 237 points.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 110 streams units.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 215,992 total units.
